_meta.authority: NON-AUTHORITATIVE REFERENCE. The live DB (core/mediavault.sqlite: vocabulary + tags tables) is the canonical vocabulary head (MV_VOCAB_RECONCILE_PLAN-20260624 F1/F3). No runtime code reads this file; it is a generated snapshot for human reference. Regenerate from the DB after vocabulary changes.
_meta.generated_from: mediavault.sqlite post press-batch Stage 2 (PRESS_BATCH_INGEST-20260707; 299 artifacts, 211 registry slugs, speaker namespace added)
_meta.format: values are lower_snake_case (underscore canonical, F2); namespaces mirror the vocabulary table (tier/sort/display); values mirror the tags registry (all have live usage > 0 per F7)

band.label: Band
band.note: renamed from `bands` 2026-07-07 (Stage 4, D-d). Distinct from the lineup value `band`.

source.label: Source
source.note: collapsed 2026-07-07 (Stage 3, F6): one value per artifact, tag == source_platform column; rule URL-host > column > tag; web folded into other; distrokid dropped (zero usage).

format.label: Format
format.note: LIVE (24 occurrences). TAXONOMY_v1 targets routing into type/attributes; retirement deferred per F5.

artifact_kind.label: Artifact Kind
artifact_kind.note: LIVE (55 occurrences). Routing/retirement deferred per F5.

content_kind.label: Content Kind
content_kind.note: LIVE (175 occurrences), export- and client-coupled (KIND_RANK, ContentKindBadge). KEPT per F4; distinct from the artifacts.kind column.

lineup.label: Lineup
lineup.note: single-valued axis (full-band vs solo). The value `band` here is NOT the Tier-1 `band` namespace.

attributes.label: Attributes
attributes.note: flat multi-valued bag. `link` folded in from the stray presentation namespace 2026-07-07 (Stage 1, F8).

exhibit.label: Exhibit
exhibit.note: routing namespace, on every artifact; export discovery keys on it. Un-retired 2026-07-07 (Stage 1, F9).

speaker.label: Speaker
speaker.note: added 2026-07-07 (PRESS_BATCH Stage 1 V3, amended): quote-speaker axis for fact artifacts; values are person AND outlet slugs (person slugs shared with people:); values registered at first use (Stage 3, 2026-07-07: 19 slugs, persons and outlets).

kind_column.label: Kind

interview.label: Interview
interview.note: activated 2026-07-07 (PRESS_BATCH Stage 1 V2); first inhabitants MV-20260617 batch

press.label: Press
press.note: added 2026-07-07 (PRESS_BATCH Stage 1 V1, table rebuild); covers press features AND reviews per V6

fact.label: Fact
fact.note: PUV surface, not a browse chip; never emitted by ingest; display UI is a separate workstream (PUV_FACT_MODEL_SPEC)

kind_column.note: The artifacts.kind COLUMN (CHECK constraint), not a tag namespace. Single-select; nullable in DB; ingest enforces leaf-required, containers exempt. `fact` joined the set 2026-07-07 (FACT_KIND_PUV_PILOT-20260707 Stage 2 table rebuild, per F10) - fact artifacts carry PUV facts per PUV_FACT_MODEL_SPEC.md.
